raw_html:
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>热炒热卖</x-hw><x-pr> rèchǎo-rèmài</x-pr>
<dt>刚炒熟的食物趁热卖掉；比喻刚学到一点<x-er>儿</x-er>东西马上就去教别人<x-f>。</x-f>（也说现炒现卖<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>尺短寸长</x-hw><x-pr> chǐduǎn-cùncháng</x-pr>
<dt>《楚辞·卜居》：“尺有所短，寸有所长。”意思是尺比寸长，用于更长处却显得短；寸比尺短，用于更短处却显得长。后用“尺短寸长”比喻每个人或事物各有各的长处和短处<x-f>。</x-f>（也说尺有所短，寸有所长<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>棒<x-er>儿</x-er>香</x-hw><x-pr> bàngrxiāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用细竹棍<x-er>儿</x-er>或细木棍<x-er>儿</x-er>做芯子的香，便于插着燃点<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>豆花<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> dòuhuār</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>某些地区指在煮开的豆浆中加入适量盐卤而凝结成的半固体，比豆腐脑<x-er>儿</x-er>略老一些<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>抹得开</x-hw><x-pr> mòdekāi</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn>面子上下得来<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>你能<x-key>抹得开</x-key>就别答应<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn>想得通<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这点<x-er>儿</x-er>不愉快的事我<x-key>抹得开</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

斗趣儿 dòuqùr
现在规范词形写作“逗趣儿”。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>拐脖<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> guǎibór</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>弯成直角的管道，用来连接两节管道使改变方向。如烟筒的拐脖<x-er>儿</x-er>，水暖管道的拐脖<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>罗圈<x-er>儿</x-er>揖</x-hw><x-pr> luóquānryī</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>身体转着圈<x-er>儿</x-er>向四周人们行的作揖礼<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>拔火罐<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> báhuǒguànr</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>拔罐<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 拔火用的上细下粗的短烟筒，罩在家用煤炉的炉口上，能把火苗往上吸，使火烧旺<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>一得之功</x-hw><x-pr> yīdézhīgōng</x-pr>
<dt>一点<x-er>儿</x-er>很小的成绩<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>笔管条直</x-hw><x-pr> bǐguǎn-tiáozhí</x-pr>
<dt>形容像毛笔杆<x-er>儿</x-er>那样直（多指直立着的）<x-f>。</x-f><dd><x-ex>两行<x-key>笔管条直</x-key>的白杨树<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>贝塔粒子</x-hw><x-pr> bèitǎ lìzǐ</x-pr>
<dt>放射性物质衰变时放射出来的高速运动的电子，带负电。穿透力比阿尔法粒子大<x-f>（</x-f>贝塔：希腊字母β音译<x-f>）</x-f>。学名写作β粒子<x-f>。</x-f>

蹀血 diéxuè
现在规范词形写作“喋血”。

十锦 shíjǐn
现在规范词形写作“什锦”。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>风戽</x-hw><x-pr> fēnghù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用风力带动的汲水灌田的旧式农具，形状有点<x-er>儿</x-er>像斗<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>赛璐玢</x-hw><x-pr> sàilùfēn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram><x-etym>英语 cellophane 音译<x-f>。</x-f></x-etym>一种玻璃纸，可以染成各种颜色，多用于包装<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鼻韵母</x-hw><x-pr> bíyùnmǔ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>带鼻音韵尾的韵母。汉语普通话语音里有 an、ian、uan、üan、en、in、un、ün、ang、iang、uang、eng、ing、ueng、ong、iong 等16个鼻韵母<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>煤砟子</x-hw><x-pr> méizhǎzi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>小块<x-er>儿</x-er>煤<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>零杂工</x-hw><x-pr> língzágōng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>做短时零星杂活<x-er>儿</x-er>的人<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>辣丝丝</x-hw><x-pr> làsīsī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>形容有点<x-er>儿</x-er>辣的感觉<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>掐尖<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> qiājiānr</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>掐去某些作物的嫩尖<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 比喻打击冒尖的人<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>见风是雨</x-hw><x-pr> jiànfēng-shìyǔ</x-pr>
<dt>比喻看到一点<x-er>儿</x-er>迹象或听到一点<x-er>儿</x-er>传言就轻率地相信并采取某种行动<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>铰肉机</x-hw><x-pr> jiǎoròujī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>把肉块铰成肉末<x-er>儿</x-er>的机械<x-f>。</x-f>

秀外惠中 xiùwài-huìzhōng
现在规范词形写作“秀外慧中”。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>榾柮</x-hw><x-pr> gǔduò</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>木头块<x-er>儿</x-er>；树根疙瘩<x-f>。</x-f><dd><x-ex>烧几块<x-key>榾柮</x-key>取暖</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>春卷<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> chūnjuǎnr</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用薄面皮裹馅<x-er>儿</x-er>，卷成长条形，油炸后食用。原是一种春令食品，现已不限于春季食用<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>排叉<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> páichàr</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种食品，将几股长方形薄面片<x-er>儿</x-er>交叉在一起放进热油中炸脆而成<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>香干<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> xiānggānr</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>经加工的有五香味<x-er>儿</x-er>的豆腐干<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>哒嗪</x-hw><x-pr> dāqín</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram><x-etym>英语 diazine 音译<x-f>。</x-f></x-etym>有机化合物。人工合成的哒嗪衍生物可用作药物<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>笔胆</x-hw><x-pr> bǐdǎn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>自来水笔笔杆内用来贮存墨水的橡皮管<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f>（也说笔囊<x-f>。</x-f>）
